title: A Minecraft Movie Datapack
description: This datapack adds a few items from the Minecraft Movie.
body:
This datapack adds a few items from the Minecraft Movie. I've published some showcases on reddit that you can find below for videos, images of crafting recipes above.

### Battle Drum
The Drum is a new block that can be crafted with any planks and any leather (Including rabbit hide). The block creates a beat when a player lands on it from any height, if the player is sneaking it produces a heavy beat instead. A drum producing a beat can be detected with an observer and used for redstone (I'm not the best but someone will come up with something). Creating a heavy beat around Piglins will give them the fire resistance potion effect and allow them to survive in the overworld for an extended period of time (Making the block akin to the film).

[Link to Reddit Video](https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/1fe31gm/made_minecraft_movie_accurate_drums/)

### Buckets & Chain
The Buckets and Chain item is inspired by the item Garret crafted with an array of random ingots and bits. The crafting recipe replicates this, as you can really make the item with any arrangement of ingots or nuggets of iron. The Buckets and Chain can collect any two fluids (but not drop). Once two fluids are collected they can be combined into a block. This is a fast in-inventory way of duplicating certain blocks.

[Link to Reddit Video](https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/1fdceuw/made_minecraft_movie_accurate_buckets/)

### Stick Sword
The Stick Sword is by far the cheapest sword variant, it deals 3 damage with 23 durability. You can upgrade it by attacking any fish-like mob from Salmon to Guardian, turning it into a Sushi Stick Sword that deals equal damage to a Wooden Sword, it's also quite tasty.

### Zombie Arm
The zombie arm is occasionally dropped by... the zombie. It is an incredibly strong weapon dealing 20 whole damage per attack. It can be enchanted with normal weapon enchantments but only has 3 durability.

### New Music Disc!
The new music disc plays the Magical Mystery Tour portions of the A Minecraft Movie Trailer with the speaking removed. It's not too bad ngl.
